seo.title: AI Studio API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to authenticate, generate AI videos, poll task results, read generation history, and check user credits with the AI Studio API.

hero.title: AI Studio API
hero.subtitle: Connect AI video generation to your app in a few steps, check progress anytime, and pay with credits.

flow.title: How it works
flow.description: From account setup to getting your final video result.
steps: Log in or create an account
Create an API Key in the dashboard
Call the video generation endpoint with your API Key
Poll the generation result when a task is queued
Check user profile, credits, and membership status

auth.title: Use your API key
auth.description: Create an API key after login, then include it in the Authorization header for every request.
auth.cardDescription: Create an API Key after login, then include it in every API request.
auth.replaceHint: The example domain is automatically resolved from NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL. Replace only YOUR_API_KEY with the key generated in your account.

endpoints.title: Available API calls
endpoints.description: These are the live endpoints currently used by AI Video Studio.

execute.description: Start a new generation task. The request uses modelId, isPublic, and payload.

task.description: Check task progress after create returns taskId and statusSupported=true.

videoHistory.description: Get paginated generation history with status and keyword filters.

user.description: Get your account profile, remaining credits, and membership summary.

parameters.modelId: Model ID for the video style/version you choose.
parameters.modelIdQuery: The modelId used by this task.
parameters.isPublic: Whether this result can be shown publicly. Default is true.
parameters.payload: Main input data for generation. Nested fields change with the selected model.
parameters.payloadAnchor: See Dynamic payload fields by model
parameters.taskId: Task ID returned after starting generation.
parameters.limit: How many recent records to return (1-50).
parameters.q: Optional keyword for searching your history.

models.title: Available model IDs
models.description: Choose a model ID that matches your desired output.

modelSchema.title: Dynamic payload fields by model
modelSchema.description: Pick a model to view the exact input fields supported by /api/ai-studio/models/{modelId}.
modelSchema.noFields: No input field docs were found for this model.

statuses.title: Task progress states
statuses.description: These states tell you whether your generation is waiting, running, done, or failed.

pricing.title: Credits-based API billing
pricing.description: Generation requests reserve and settle credits through the existing AI Studio generation flow.
items: API usage is billed with credits.
Each generation can consume credits based on the selected model, duration, quality, resolution, and pricing row.
Users can check remaining credits from the account or /api/auth/user.
Generation is blocked when the account has insufficient credits.

faq.title: AI Studio API FAQ
faq.description: Quick answers for setup, billing, and generation progress.

items.question: How do I get an API key?
items.answer: Log in, open the API Keys dashboard, and create an active key. Use it as Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY.

items.question: How do I authenticate API requests?
items.answer: Send the API key in the Authorization header using the Bearer format on every request.

items.question: How is API usage billed?
items.answer: Generation calls use account credits. The consumed amount depends on the model and selected pricing options.

items.question: How do I check video generation status?
items.answer: After the execute endpoint returns taskId and statusSupported is true, poll /api/ai-studio/tasks/{taskId}?modelId={modelId}.

items.question: Where can I view my generation history?
items.answer: Use /api/ai-studio/video-history for your paginated generation history.

items.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
items.answer: New generation requests cannot continue when the account does not have enough credits.

items.question: Can I use the API for commercial projects?
items.answer: The API can be integrated into production workflows, subject to your account plan and the service terms.

items.question: Does the API support different video models?
items.answer: Yes. Available model IDs are the models configured in config/ai-video-studio.ts.

finalCta.title: Start using AI Studio API
finalCta.description: Create your API key, run your first request, and track progress in real time.
